seo.title: Optikom Business — Turnkey IT and Communications for Business
seo.description: Managed IT and telecom services for business: internet, IT outsourcing, video surveillance, 24/7 SLA support. Single contractor for your office in Uzbekistan.

before.title: Regular Office
items: Internet lags when everyone is in the office
Tons of bills: for internet, servers, and cameras

about.title: Your complete IT department by subscription
about.description: Optikom Business is the corporate division of the company, providing managed IT and telecom services to businesses in a single subscription model. We take all the infrastructure headaches away from you.

hero.title: Fast Internet and Reliable IT Support
hero.description: We take over the entire IT infrastructure of your business. Forget about system failures and downtime - with us everything works like clockwork.

logos.title: Trusted by Corporations and Small Businesses

items.pc: IT Support: PC and office equipment maintenance
items.wifi: Office Wi-Fi: network design and maintenance
items.cctv: Video Surveillance: system installation and maintenance

engineers.title: Engineer On-site Visits
engineers.desc: For urgent resolution of physical hardware issues.

products.title: Product Ecosystem
products.subtitle: Comprehensive infrastructure solutions for companies of any size.

contact.title: Ready for a New Level of IT?
contact.description: Leave a request, and our specialist will contact you within 15 minutes for a consultation.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Your data is protected according to the ISO 27001 standard

form.name: Your name
form.success: Your application has been successfully sent! We will contact you soon.
form.error: An error occurred. Try again or call us.

contact.address: Tashkent city, Shota Rustaveli str., 1st pass., 6

faqs.title: Questions and Answers
faqs.subtitle: All you need to know about our approach to work.

items.question: How quickly do you respond to requests?
items.answer: We respond to critical incidents within 15 minutes. For regular requests, response time ranges from 1 to 4 hours according to SLA.

items.question: What is included in the subscription service?
items.answer: Everything: from user support (Helpdesk) to server configuration, maintenance of Wi-Fi networks, printers, and even video surveillance systems.

items.question: Do you have your own engineers or do you hire contractors?
items.answer: We have our own staff of qualified engineers and sysadmins. We bear full material responsibility for the infrastructure.

items.question: Can you work with companies from other cities?
items.answer: At the moment, we focus on Tashkent to ensure maximum speed of engineer on-site visits.

process.title: Let's Start Working Today
process.subtitle: Only 5 simple steps from chaos to a stable infrastructure.

steps.title: Consultation

steps.title: Ready
steps.desc: Your business is under our reliable protection

tariffs.title: Flexible Tariff Plans
tariffs.subtitle: Forget about hidden fees. Transparent monthly fee including everything your office needs to work.

map.title: We Work Throughout Uzbekistan
map.subtitle: Our engineers are ready to visit any point in the country. We ensure connectivity of branches and centralized management of IT infrastructure.

calc.title: Build your tariff
calc.subtitle: Configure the package of services for the realities of your company and immediately find out the subscription fee.

sla.title: SLA Level
sla.bonus_desc: When ordering more than 20 PCs — Premium SLA as a gift!
sla.standard_desc: Regulated reaction time and round-the-clock monitoring.

sum.title: Total estimate
sum.subtitle: Estimated cost
sum.disclaimer: The calculation is not a public offer. The final estimate is formed after the IT audit of your infrastructure.

compare.desc_standard: Vacations, sick days, taxes, single point of failure, risk of dismissal.
compare.desc_modern: A whole team of engineers, transparent area of responsibility, 24/7 work without sick days.

s1.title: 1. General Provisions
s1.text: This Privacy Policy determines the procedure for collecting, processing and storing personal data of users of the Optikom Business website (hereinafter — the "Site"). By using the Site, you agree to the terms of this Policy.

s2.title: 2. What data we collect
s2.text: When filling out the feedback form, we may request:
s2.subtext: The Site may also automatically collect technical data: IP address, browser type, visit pages — solely for the purpose of improving the Site's operation.

s3.title: 3. Purposes of data processing
list: Processing of incoming applications and feedback with potential clients

s4.title: 4. Transfer of data to third parties
s4.text: We do not sell, exchange or transfer your personal data to third parties without your consent, except in cases provided for by the legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

s5.title: 5. Cookies
s5.text: The Site may use Cookies to improve the user experience. You can disable them in your browser settings, however, this may affect the operation of some functions of the Site.

s6.title: 6. Data storage
s6.text: Personal data is stored on secure servers and no longer than necessary to achieve the goals of processing. Upon your written request, data can be deleted from our system.

s7.title: 7. Contacts
s7.text: For questions related to the processing of personal data, please contact:

s1.title: 1. Subject of the Agreement
s1.text: This User Agreement regulates the relationship between Optikom Business (corporate direction of Optikom LLC) and the user of the Site arising from the use of this Site and its services.

s2.title: 2. Acceptance of terms
s2.text: By using the Site, you confirm that you have read, understood and accept the terms of this agreement. If you do not agree with any terms, please stop using the Site.

s3.title: 3. Use of the Site
list: Not to use the Site for illegal or fraudulent purposes
Not to violate the normal operation of the Site or its infrastructure
Provide reliable information when filling out forms
Not to copy or distribute the materials of the Site without permission

s4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
s4.text: All materials posted on the Site (texts, images, logos, design) are the property of Optikom Business and are protected by the legislation on intellectual property of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

s5.title: 5. Applications and services
s5.text: An application left through the form on the Site is not a public offer and does not entail an automatic conclusion of a contract. A commercial proposal is formed individually after matching the conditions with the manager.

s6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
s6.text: The Site is provided "as is". Optikom Business is not responsible for interruptions in the operation of the Site caused by technical reasons, actions of third parties or force majeure circumstances.

s7.title: 7. Change of conditions
s7.text: Optikom Business reserves the right to make changes to this agreement at any time. The current version is always available on this page. Continued use of the Site after the publication of changes means your agreement with them.

s8.title: 8. Applicable law
s8.text: This agreement is regulated by the legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan. All disputes are resolved in court at the location of Optikom Business.

s9.title: 9. Contacts
s9.text: For questions related to this agreement, please contact:
